prompt: purple robot astronaut with a glass helmet and tiny boots
userPrompt: purple robot astronaut with a glass helmet and tiny boots
expandedPrompt: A cute purple robot astronaut featuring a glossy glass helmet that reflects stars, tiny metallic boots with a shiny finish, and a compact body with rounded edges. The robot has expressive LED eyes displaying excitement, a friendly smile, and small antennae on top of the helmet. It has decorative patches resembling space badges on its chest and a glowing star emblem on one boot, with a backdrop of twinkling stars.

rawReactCssCharacterContent:
{
  "componentName": "PurpleRobotAstronaut",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Purple Robot Astronaut",
  "summary": "A cute purple robot astronaut with a glossy glass helmet and tiny metallic boots, embodying a playful spirit.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#6b5e9b",
    "--dude-secondary": "#c0c0c0",
    "--dude-accent": "#00bfff",
    "--dude-eye": "#ffffff",
    "--dude-panel": "rgba(255,255,255,.18)",
    "--dude-mouth": "#0f172a"
  },
  "headShape": "helmet",
  "bodyShape": "robot",
  "expression": "excited",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "antenna", "side": "top", "label": "small antennae", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "eye", "side": "left", "label": "expressive LED eye", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "eye", "side": "right", "label": "expressive LED eye", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "mouth", "label": "friendly smile", "tone": "mouth" },
    { "type": "badge", "label": "decorative space badge", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "boot", "side": "left", "label": "tiny metallic boot", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "boot", "side": "right", "label": "tiny metallic boot", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "star", "side": "body.front", "label": "glowing star emblem", "tone": "accent" }
  ],
  "notes": ["Includes a glossy glass helmet, tiny metallic boots, expressive LED eyes, and a glowing star emblem."]
}
